title: atuna elata
intro: Atuna elata, also known as the "Benguet almond" or "Atuna", is a type of tropical tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Atuna elata include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and improving digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy in the region. Atuna elata can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including tea infusions and extracts, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
